description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An occupied Zoox autonomous vehicle (Vehicle 1) was traveling west on Duboce Avenue past Otis Street when it encountered debris in the 
lane. The Zoox vehicle braked hard for the debris and was then rear ended by a close-following Pickup (Vehicle 2) that was abruptly 
merging into the lane directly behind the Zoox vehicle. The Vehicle 2 driver then reversed and left the scene without attempting to exchange
 information. Shortly after, the Zoox vehicle cleared the scene, turned right onto Valencia Street, and pulled over to allow the riders to exit 
the vehicle. The Zoox vehicle then returned to base for inspection and was found to have sustained moderate damage. There were no 
reported injuries, and the police were notified. 
Print
Clear Form
